title: Remove mob variants
description: Change the description to this Restores classic textures for pigs, cows, and chickens by disabling biome-specific variants. No mods or shaders are required for installation. Wolf textures are not affected by this pack
body: Restores classic textures for pigs, cows, and chickens by disabling biome-specific variants. No mods or shaders are required for installation. Wolf textures are not affected by this pack.
